appliedUpdates.description: Added Codex wire method mapping documentation to architecture.md: method mapping layer description in send_request() chain, extract_text_from_params() helper function location and priority ordering, transport-specific thread ID formats (pi-thread-{uuid} for Pi, Droid session ID for Droid), and DroidAcpTransport thread/read parity gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary: extract_text_from_params() is duplicated across pi/transport.rs and droid/transport.rs. Future refactors should extract it to a shared utility module (e.g., provider/utils.rs) rather than adding a third copy. The ACP transports already import from droid/transport.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: DroidNativeTransport re-implements extract_text_from_params() that was already in PiNativeTransport. DroidAcpTransport imports it from droid/transport.rs. A third provider type would require deciding where to put the function.
